meta.title: 1CYBER — Penetration Testing & Security Audit
meta.description: We find vulnerabilities in your system before someone else does. Pentesting, security audit, monitoring. Astana, Kazakhstan.

hero.headline: We find holes in your system
hero.sub:
Pentesting, security audit, monitoring.
Before someone else does.

items.name: Unauthenticated APIs
items.desc: Your clients, payments, budget — accessible with a single curl request

items.name: Hardcoded keys
items.desc: API keys in source maps, fallback tokens in code — full access to WhatsApp, payment systems

items.name: Source code leaks
items.desc: Source maps, .git repositories, server.js — your entire codebase exposed

items.name: Personal data exposure
items.desc: Names, phone numbers, payments of your clients — publicly accessible

items.name: Server vulnerabilities
items.desc: SSH with password, open DB ports, CORS wildcard, missing security headers

items.name: Unauthenticated write access
items.desc: Creating, deleting data, sending messages — no login required

steps.desc: Information gathering: subdomains, DNS, ports, technologies
Manual testing: API, auth, IDOR, source maps, keys
Report: every vulnerability with PoC and remediation guide
Monthly checks: no new vulnerabilities appear

pentest.name: PENTEST
features: Report with PoC for each vulnerability

monitoring.name: MONITORING
features: Report: all clear or new issues
